external_services.service_name: Application for Cadaver Transfer Permit/ Burial Permit / Cremation Permit / Exhumation Permit
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Cadaver Transfer Permit_Burial Permit_Cremation Permit
external_services.who_may_avail: Nearest kin of the deceased person

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Death Certificate from hospital, if none Death Certificate and other Death Permits by the City Health Officer
Death Certificate of remains to be exhumed
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Civil Registrar Office or Personal File

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Exhumation Permit shall only be approved after a lapse of 5-year burial period

steps.client_step: 1. Approach the Lipa City Health Office through the transaction window and present the death certificate
steps.agency_action: 1. Receive death certificate and interview the client to validate information and request permit
steps.person_responsible: Midwife II (Lipa City Health Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the corresponding fee to the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Prepare requested permit and give the client the corresponding payment slip
steps.fees_to_be_paid: Transfer permit: P100 (within the city), P50 (outside the city); Burial permit: P50; Cremation permit: P200; Exhumation Permit: P100 per tomb
steps.person_responsible: Midwife II (Lipa City Health Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the corresponding fee to the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office
steps.person_responsible: City Health Officer / Medical Officer on duty (Lipa City Health Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the official receipt to Lipa City Health Office to claim the requested permit
steps.agency_action: 3. Issue requested permit together with the death certificate upon presentation of receipt
steps.person_responsible: Midwife II (Lipa City Health Office)

external_services.total_fees_to_be_paid: Transfer permit: P100 (within the city), P50 (outside the city); Burial permit: P50; Cremation permit: P200; Exhumation Permit: P100 per tomb
